CustomField.label: Cumulative Calculation
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If checked, the incentive calculation for this period will aggregate achievements from all child periods (linked via Parent Period). Example: A Quarterly period with cumulative enabled will sum achievements from its 3 monthly child periods. Useful for FMCG quarterly PBIS where Q2 = Q1+Q2 cumulative.
CustomField.description: When true, incentive calculation sums achievements from all child periods. Used for cumulative quarterly/annual calculations.
